settingsTimeline.title: Timeline score weights
settingsTimeline.intro: Each factor is normalized to 0–1 per article. The score is the sum of factor × (weight ÷ 100). Missing data counts as 0. Content length uses a separate slider (shorter ↔ longer); at 0 it adds nothing. Preferences are saved to your account (shortly after you stop moving a slider); a local copy speeds up loading.
settingsTimeline.formulaHint: Only factors with weight > 0 appear. The real ranking job will use the same names.

contentLengthPreference.label: Length bias (title + teaser + summary)
contentLengthPreference.hint: Left: shorter texts score higher (min(1, cap/len)). Right: longer score higher (min(1, len/cap)). Center 0: no effect. Strength scales with distance from center.

published_recency.label: Publication freshness
published_recency.hint: 1 = just published, decays by half-life (~72 h).

inserted_recency.label: New on your timeline
inserted_recency.hint: 1 = just added to you; uses insertedAt from the server.

content_length.label: Content length (weight)
content_length.hint: How much the length bias below affects the score. Set to 0 to ignore length entirely.

crawl_diversity.label: Source mix bonus
crawl_diversity.hint: Placeholder 0 until iterative spacing between feeds is implemented.

category_diversity.label: Category mix bonus
category_diversity.hint: Placeholder 0 until category repetition penalty exists.

tag_diversity.label: Tag mix bonus
tag_diversity.hint: Placeholder 0 until tag repetition penalty exists.

index.preparingBody: Once the crawler delivers articles for one of your feeds, they will appear here.
index.emptyNoFeedsBody: Add RSS or Atom feeds so your timeline can show articles. Imports must use the same feed URL you saved here so items match your subscription.

feeds.title: Feeds
feeds.intro: Add or remove sources. Your timeline only shows articles from feeds listed here.
feeds.emptyList: No feeds saved yet. Add one above.

login.title: infl0
login.srpHint: Sign-in uses SRP-6a: your password is not sent to the server (use HTTPS in production).

register.title: Create account
register.hint: Password stays in your browser; only an SRP verifier is stored on the server.
register.signInLink: Already have an account? Sign in
